ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell type of the observation */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition of the observation (e.g., control, treated) */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the observation */,
  "time_point" INTEGER /* Time point of the observation */,
  "time_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time unit of the observation (e.g., hour, minute) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the observation belongs to */,
  "data_value" REAL /* The actual data value observed */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* The unit of the observed data (e.g., mg, mL) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "entered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the observation */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was entered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_time_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_unit_id") REFERENCES time_units ("time_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_entered_by FOREIGN KEY ("entered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type (e.g., utricle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the cell type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cell type (e.g., laboratory, supplier) */,
  "growth_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the cells are grown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., control, treated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment (if applicable) */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "treatment_method" TEXT /* Method of applying the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate */,
  "replicate_description" TEXT /* Description of the replicate */,
  "replicate_date" TEXT /* Date when the replicate was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "time_point_value" INTEGER /* Value of the time point */,
  "time_point_description" TEXT /* Description of the time point */,
  "time_point_type" TEXT /* Type of the time point (e.g., start, end, intermediate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_units" (
  "time_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time unit */,
  "time_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the time unit (e.g., hour, minute) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the time unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experimental design used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES experimental_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_design_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental design being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the design */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who versioned the design */,
  "versioned_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was versioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_design_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_design_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES experimental_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who versioned the experiment */,
  "versioned_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was versioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
